description_text:
Philips SimplyGo Mini Portable Oxygen Concentrator

Philips SimplyGo Mini is one of the most popular pulse-flow portable oxygen concentrators that delivers oxygen at 1-5 settings with a purity level of above 90%. 

Lightweight and Easy to Carry: Philips SimplyGo Mini weighs just 2.30 kgs and can easily be carried in a side bag.

High Battery Backup: The device can give battery backup of up to 4.50 hours with the single battery and 9 hours with the external battery.

Recharge Time: It takes 4 hours for the device to get fully recharged.

Operating Altitude: Operating altitude of the device is 10000 feet.

Outlet Pressure: This portable oxygen concentrator has an outlet pressure of 20 psi.

Alarms: Loss of power and system malfunction

Sound Level: Philips SimplyGo Mini emits sound at 52 decibels.

Certifications and Approvals: This portable oxygen concentrator is FAA and FDA approved and also has CE certification. 

Warranty: The warranty period of Philips SimplyGo Mini is 2 years on the machine and 3 months on battery and accessories

 What's in The Box? 


	Simply Go Mini Device in carrying case with shoulder strap
